## Summary
<!-- One or two sentences explaining what this PR does and why. -->

## Linked issues
<!-- e.g. "Closes #123", "Fixes #456" -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Refactor / chore (`refactor:` / `chore:`)
- [ ] CI / build (`ci:` / `build:`)
- [ ] Breaking change

## Test plan
<!-- Steps you took to verify the change. Include commands, screenshots, logs if helpful. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (e.g. `feat: …`, `fix(scope): …`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (README / docs / CHANGELOG) where applicable
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` files committed
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff
